scripts.clean: rimraf client/angular/dist client/core/dist client/angular/.angular client/core/.angular client/core/.tsbuildinfo causal_tracing/react-client/dist causal_tracing/react-client/.vite logviz/angular-client/dist logviz/angular-client/.angular logviz/react-client/dist logviz/react-client/.vite
scripts.deep-clean: rimraf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml client/angular/node_modules client/core/node_modules causal_tracing/react-client/node_modules logviz/angular-client/node_modules logviz/react-client/node_modules
scripts.reset: pnpm install && pnpm run clean && pnpm run deep-clean
scripts.reset-all: pnpm run bazel-reset && pnpm run reset
scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:angular
scripts.build:causal-tracing: pnpm run build:core && bazel build //causal_tracing/server:server && pnpm --filter ./causal_tracing/react-client run build
scripts.build:logviz: pnpm --filter ./logviz/angular-client run build && pnpm --filter ./logviz/react-client run build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:angular
scripts.bt: pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.ibt: pnpm run install:all && pnpm run bt
scripts.ib:logviz: pnpm run install:logviz && pnpm run build:logviz
scripts.dev:logviz: pnpm run ib:logviz && cd logviz && go run server/server.go --angular_root ./angular-client/dist/angular-client  --react_root ./react-client/dist --client_watch_cwd ..  --client_watch_cmd "pnpm --filter ./logviz/react-client exec vite build --watch"
scripts.dev:causal-tracing: pnpm run build:causal-tracing && bazel run //causal_tracing/server:server -- --react_root "$PWD/causal_tracing/react-client/dist" --trace_root / --default_trace_path "$PWD/causal_tracing/testdata/compose-post-ct-logs.json" --client_watch_cwd "$PWD" --client_watch_cmd "pnpm --filter ./causal_tracing/react-client exec vite build --watch"
scripts.demo: pnpm run ibt && pnpm run ib:logviz && pnpm run run:logviz
